James Carter
Dallas, TX

Summary
Dedicated and efficient Warehouse Associate with over 3 years of experience in fast-paced warehouse environments. Proven ability to operate RF scanners effectively, lift heavy items consistently, and maintain a high level of accuracy in inventory management. Seeking to leverage my skills in a dynamic warehouse setting in Dallas.

Experience
Warehouse Associate  
ABC Logistics, Dallas, TX  
March 2021 - Present  
- Operated RF scanners to track inventory levels, ensuring accuracy in stock management.
- Responsible for lifting and transporting items up to 50 lbs daily, maintaining safety protocols.
- Collaborated with team members to optimize loading and unloading processes, improving overall efficiency by 15%.
- Assisted in training new hires on warehouse procedures and safety standards.

Warehouse Technician  
XYZ Supply Co., Dallas, TX  
January 2019 - February 2021  
- Managed inventory organization and retrieval using RF scanners to fulfill customer orders.
- Conducted regular stock checks and assisted in restocking shelves as needed.
- Lifted and moved products weighing up to 50 lbs, ensuring safe handling during transport.
- Maintained a clean and organized work environment, adhering to all safety regulations.
